releaseNotes: Big batch of UX polish + reliability. You stay signed in when offline or when the backend hiccups — no more retyping your password after a WiFi blip. Focus session debriefs now show on each session record with their auto-classified tag (deep work / admin / learning / etc.). Sleep records lead with your own notes when written. Extended focus quick-picks all the way up to 240 min for marathon sessions. Math dismiss-mission picker contrast bumped — the selected count is unmistakable in both light and dark themes. Shake dismiss-mission count swapped from a +/- stepper to a single-drag slider. Clearer messaging when an offline feature can't reach the server. Plus the AI now factors sleep-talk episodes, focus-session phone pickups, and your debrief tags into weekly summaries and Coach answers — and a new Coach tool lets it pull per-session detail on demand.
